---
pagetitle: "404"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false

css: styles/404.css
---

```{=html}


<div class="page-404">

  <div class="computing-label" id="computing-label-404">
    computing...<span class="spinner-inline"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="diagrams-row">

    <div class="diag-item" id="f404-d0">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" width="70" height="70" viewBox="0 0 511.43104 356.55"><path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1538.904)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 396.85533H283.4681"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1538.904)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 510.24259H283.4681"/></svg>
      <div class="diag-order">𝒪(g⁰)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-plus" style="margin-bottom:1em;" id="f404-p0">+</div>

    <div class="diag-item" id="f404-d1">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" width="70" height="70" viewBox="0 0 511.43104 341.352"><path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1106.109)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 255.12128 198.42766 283.4681"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1106.109)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M198.42766 283.4681V340.1617"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1106.109)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M198.42766 340.1617 283.4681 368.5085"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1106.109)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 368.5085 198.42766 340.1617"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,1106.109)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M198.42766 283.4681 283.4681 255.12128"/></svg>
      <div class="diag-order">𝒪(g²)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-plus" style="margin-bottom:1em;" id="f404-p1">+</div>

    <div class="diag-item" id="f404-d2">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" width="70" height="70" viewBox="0 0 511.43104 341.352"><path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 113.38724 170.08086 141.73404"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M170.08086 141.73404H226.77448"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M226.77448 141.73404 283.4681 113.38724"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M113.38724 226.77448 170.08086 198.42766"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M170.08086 198.42766H226.77448"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M226.77448 198.42766 283.4681 226.77448"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M170.08086 141.73404V198.42766"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-339.56098,680.91299)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M226.77448 141.73404V198.42766"/></svg>
      <div class="diag-order">𝒪(g⁴)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-plus" style="margin-bottom:1em;" id="f404-p2">+</div>

    <div class="diag-item" id="f404-d3">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" width="70" height="70" viewBox="0 0 511.43104 341.352"><path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M425.20213 340.1617 453.54896 368.5085"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M453.54896 368.5085H510.24259"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M453.54896 368.5085V425.20213"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M425.20213 453.54896 453.54896 425.20213"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M453.54896 425.20213H510.24259"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M510.24259 368.5085V425.20213"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M510.24259 368.5085H566.9362"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M510.24259 425.20213H566.9362"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="8.97,8.97" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M566.9362 368.5085V425.20213"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M566.9362 368.5085 595.283 340.1617"/>
<path transform="matrix(3,0,0,-3,-1274.991,1361.2261)" stroke-width="4.0" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linejoin="miter" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" d="M566.9362 425.20213 595.283 453.54896"/></svg>
      <div class="diag-order">𝒪(g⁶)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-plus" style="margin-bottom:1em;" id="f404-p3" style="font-size:1rem;">+ ···</div>

    <div class="diag-item" style="margin-bottom:1.25em;" id="f404-d4">
      <span class="diag-result">= 404</span>
    </div>

  </div>

  <p class="tagline-en" id="f404-tagline-en">
    This page was not found at any order in perturbation theory.
  </p>
  <p class="tagline-fr" id="f404-tagline-fr">
    Cette page est introuvable à tout ordre en théorie des perturbations.
  </p>

</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const labels = [
    "computing 𝒪(g⁰)...",
    "computing 𝒪(g²)...",
    "computing 𝒪(g⁴)...",
    "computing 𝒪(g⁶)...",
    "summing series..."
  ];
  const steps = [
    function () { document.getElementById('f404-d0').classList.add('visible'); },
    function () { document.getElementById('f404-p0').classList.add('visible'); document.getElementById('f404-d1').classList.add('visible'); },
    function () { document.getElementById('f404-p1').classList.add('visible'); document.getElementById('f404-d2').classList.add('visible'); },
    function () { document.getElementById('f404-p2').classList.add('visible'); document.getElementById('f404-d3').classList.add('visible'); },
    function () { document.getElementById('f404-p3').classList.add('visible'); document.getElementById('f404-d4').classList.add('visible'); }
  ];
  var delays = [300, 900, 1600, 2400, 3300];
  var lbl = document.getElementById('computing-label-404');

  steps.forEach(function (fn, i) {
    setTimeout(function () {
      lbl.innerHTML = labels[i] + '<span class="spinner-inline"></span>';
      fn();
    }, delays[i]);
  });

  setTimeout(function () {
    lbl.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(function () { lbl.style.visibility = 'hidden'; }, 400);
    document.getElementById('f404-tagline-en').classList.add('visible');
  }, 4000);

  setTimeout(function () {
    document.getElementById('f404-tagline-fr').classList.add('visible');
  }, 4500);
})();
</script>
```
